analysis.consistency: High. The spell describes a clear mechanical effect (animation of undead) and consistent limitations (casting time, range, duration, and maintenance). The scaling ('At Higher Levels') logically increases the power and number/quality of the animated undead.
analysis.quality: High. The description is detailed, covering the animation process, control mechanics (bonus action command, duration of control), and the upkeep required to maintain the summoned undead. The components are thematic for necromancy.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (one clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 gp black onyx stone for each corpse)
mechanics.control_mechanism: Bonus action command per turn, up to 120 feet range. Command persists until task completion or next order.
mechanics.upkeep: Must be recast within 24 hours to maintain control over existing animated creatures, rather than animating new ones.

scaling_analysis.8th_level: Offers choice: 5 ghouls OR 2 ghasts OR 2 wights.
scaling_analysis.9th_level: Offers choice: 6 ghouls OR 3 ghasts OR 3 wights OR 2 mummies.
scaling_analysis.notes: The scaling offers meaningful mechanical upgrades, introducing stronger undead types (Ghasts, Wights, Mummies) at higher tiers, which is standard and effective for high-level spells.

mechanics.limitation: Can only be cast at night.
